info.name: Doctorna API v2 (Minimal & Clean)
info.description:
# Doctorna API v2

This collection has been strictly optimized. All redundant endpoints have been removed.

---

## 📄 Global Pagination
All **GET All** endpoints support pagination via `?page=1&limit=10`. Response includes `list` + `pagination` metadata (current_page, per_page, total_records, total_pages, has_next, has_prev).

---

## 🔍 Doctors

### `GET /doctors` — List (with filters + pagination)
| Query Param | Type | Description |
|-------------|------|-------------|
| `name` | string | Search by name (LIKE, partial match) |
| `gender` | string | `male` or `female` |
| `rank` | string | `intern`, `resident`, `specialist`, `senior specialist`, `consultant` |
| `is_available` | int | `0` or `1` |
| `spec_id` | int | Filter by speciality ID |
| `speciality_name` | string | Search by speciality name (LIKE) — requires `include_all=1` |
| `include_all` | int | `1` — JOIN with speciality table, returns `speciality_name` + `speciality_description` |
| `page` | int | Page number (default: 1) |
| `limit` | int | Results per page (max: 100, default: 10) |

### `GET /doctors?id=N` — Single doctor (with speciality data)
Returns doctor data + `speciality_name` + `speciality_description`.

### `POST /doctors` — Create (Admin)
**Body:** `{"name", "email", "rank", "gender", "spec_id"}`

### `PUT /doctors?id=N` — Full update (Admin)
**Body:** any subset of doctor fields (merged with existing).

### `PATCH /doctors?id=N` — Partial update (Admin)
**Body:** any subset of doctor fields.

### `DELETE /doctors?id=N` — Soft delete (Admin)

---

## 🔍 Specialities

### `GET /specialities` — List (with filters + pagination)
| Query Param | Type | Description |
|-------------|------|-------------|
| `name` | string | Search by name (LIKE) |
| `page` | int | Page number |
| `limit` | int | Results per page |

### `GET /specialities?id=N` — Single speciality
| Query Param | Type | Description |
|-------------|------|-------------|
| `include_doctors` | int | `1` — appends `doctors_count` field |

### `POST /specialities` — Create (Admin)
**Body:** `{"name", "description"}`

### `PUT|PATCH /specialities?id=N` — Update (Admin)
**Body:** any subset of speciality fields.

### `DELETE /specialities?id=N` — Soft delete (Admin)

---

## 🔍 Appointments

### `GET /appointments` — List (Admin sees all, User sees own)
| Query Param | Type | Description |
|-------------|------|-------------|
| `status` | string | `pending`, `confirmed`, `cancelled`, `completed` |
| `date_time` | string | Filter by date `YYYY-MM-DD` or datetime `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS` |
| `doc_id` | int | Filter by doctor ID |
| `user_id` | int | Filter by user ID |
| `page` | int | Page number |
| `limit` | int | Results per page |

### `GET /appointments?id=N` — Single appointment (Admin)

### `POST /appointments` — Book (User)
**Body:** `{"status", "date_time", "doc_id"}`

### `PUT|PATCH /appointments?id=N` — Update status (Admin)
**Body:** any subset of appointment fields.

---

## 🔍 Patients (Admin only)

### `GET /patients` — List
| Query Param | Type | Description |
|-------------|------|-------------|
| `name` | string | Search by name |
| `gender` | string | `male` or `female` |
| `age` | int | Filter by exact age |
| `page` | int | Page number |
| `limit` | int | Results per page |

### `GET /patients?id=N` — Single patient
### `PUT|PATCH /patients?id=N` — Update
### `DELETE /patients?id=N` — Soft delete

---

## 🔍 SubServices

### `GET /subservices` — List (with filters + pagination)
| Query Param | Type | Description |
|-------------|------|-------------|
| `name` | string | Search by name (LIKE) |
| `min_fees` | number | Minimum fees `>=` |
| `max_fees` | number | Maximum fees `<=` |
| `page` | int | Page number |
| `limit` | int | Results per page |

### `GET /subservices?id=N` — Single subservice
### `POST /subservices` — Create (Admin)
**Body:** `{"name", "fees", "description"}`
### `PUT|PATCH /subservices?id=N` — Update (Admin)
### `DELETE /subservices?id=N` — Soft delete (Admin)

---

## 🔐 Auth (All POST)

### `POST /auth/register`
**Body:** `{"name", "email", "password", "age", "gender", "phone", "role": "user"}`

### `POST /auth/login`
**Body:** `{"email", "password"}`

### `POST /auth/forgot-password`
**Body:** `{"email"}` — sends reset token

### `POST /auth/reset-password`
**Body:** `{"email", "token", "new_password"}`

item.name: 1. Authentication
item.description: Endpoints for user registration, login, and password recovery.

query.description: Set to 1 to JOIN speciality data + enable speciality_name filter

request.description: Fetch all doctors. Check the 'Params' tab in Postman to easily toggle optional filters on/off!

### Create New Doctor
**Requires Admin Privileges.**
Creates a new doctor profile and invalidates the `doctors:*` Redis cache namespace.

item.name: Update Doctor (Admin)

request.description:
### Update Doctor
**Requires Admin Privileges.**
Performs a partial update (PATCH). Only provided fields will be updated. Invalidates caches.

item.description: ### Update Doctor (Full/Put)\n**Requires Admin Privileges.**\nAccepts partial data via PUT — merges with existing record. Invalidates caches.

item.name: Patch Doctor (Partial, Admin)

request.description:
### Update Doctor
**Requires Admin Privileges.**
Performs a partial update (PATCH). Only provided fields will be updated. Invalidates caches.

item.description: ### Patch Doctor\n**Requires Admin Privileges.**\nPartial update (PATCH). Only sent fields are updated. Invalidates caches.

request.description:
### Delete Doctor
**Requires Admin Privileges.**
Performs a **Soft Delete** (`deleted_at = NOW()`). This preserves referential integrity for historical appointments.
Users see only their own. Admins see all. Check 'Params' tab to toggle filters.

### Update Appointment Status
**Requires Admin Privileges.**
Allows admins to change the status of an appointment (`pending`, `confirmed`, `cancelled`, `completed`).

### Fetch Single Patient
**Requires Admin Privileges.**
Retrieves patient details. Will return 404 if the requested ID belongs to an admin account.

### Update Patient Details
**Requires Admin Privileges.**
Partial update for patient records.

### Delete Patient
**Requires Admin Privileges.**
Performs a **Soft Delete** on the user record.

query.description: Set to 1 to append doctors_count field

request.description: ### Create Speciality\n**Requires Admin Privileges.**\nCreates a new medical speciality.
### Update Speciality\n**Requires Admin Privileges.**\nPartial update — only provided fields will change.
### Delete Speciality\n**Requires Admin Privileges.**\nPerforms a **Soft Delete** (`deleted_at = NOW()`).

### Delete SubService
**Requires Admin Privileges.**
**Note:** Unlike all other modules, deleting a SubService performs a **Hard Delete** (`DELETE FROM`), completely removing it from the database as it acts as standalone reference data.
